name: EduLearn
description: EduLearn is a premier online education platform offering expert-led courses in technology, business, design, and more. Start learning today and transform your career.

hero.headline: Learn Without Limits
hero.subheadline: Access 500+ expert-led courses in tech, business, design & more. Join 50,000+ learners transforming their careers.

heroSlides.headline: Learn Without Limits
heroSlides.subheadline: Access 500+ expert-led courses in tech, business, design & more. Join 50,000+ learners transforming their careers.

heroSlides.headline: Speak German with Confidence
heroSlides.subheadline: Join our structured German language classes from A1 to B2. Small groups, expert teachers, and proven methods.

heroSlides.headline: Certify Your Skills
heroSlides.subheadline: Earn industry-recognised certificates that employers value. Build your portfolio and land your dream job.

features.title: HD Video Lessons
features.description: Crystal-clear video content from world-class instructors at your own pace.

features.title: Industry Certificates
features.description: Earn recognized certificates that boost your resume and career prospects.

features.title: Vibrant Community
features.description: Connect with peers and mentors in a collaborative learning environment.

features.title: Lifetime Access
features.description: Buy once, learn forever. All courses come with lifetime access and updates.

seo.defaultDescription: EduLearn offers 500+ expert-led online courses in technology, business, design and more. Start learning today with lifetime access.
